title: Vibrant Leaf Litter
description: This Resource-Pack Replaces The Ugly Vanilla Leaf Litter Textures With A More Vibrant, Visually Appealing Look.
body:
# What Does This Do?
This resource-pack changes the Leaf Litter texture and gives it a bit more colour!

# How Can I Install It?
Once you've downloaded the resource-pack (located in versions) you will have to find your minecraft resourcepacks folder. (usually at C:\Users\(USER)\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\resourcepacks)

![Leaf Litter in an oak forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54316c8305605ab6a70b7ac88d4dbd0079b31d84.jpeg)

![Leaf Litter in a plains biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f5d52e276a3419711c10fd88a21166c11f05915.jpeg)
